privileged_info_summary: The task involves reassigning a workflow task in Nuxeo Platform, a real open-source ECM system. All metadata values are verified: the target document is located at '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023' (confirmed in setup scripts), the original assignee is 'jsmith' (John Smith, created during setup), the new assignee is 'jdoe' (Jane Doe, created during setup), and the workflow model is 'ParallelDocumentReview', a real standard Nuxeo workflow for parallel document review processes. The document operates on synthetic test data (synthetic PDF files and test users), but leverages the real Nuxeo Platform 10.10 system which supports task reassignment and delegation features.
